title: Taproot Descriptors
description: Taproot descriptors use the `tr()` expression to describe P2TR outputs, including internal keys and optional script-path commitments. They extend generic output descriptors with Taproot-specific structure without becoming a transaction construction or signing workflow by themselves.

resources.title: BIP 386: tr() Output Script Descriptors
resources.notes: Primary specification for Taproot descriptor syntax and its mapping to P2TR outputs.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Output Script Descriptors
resources.notes: Source-native context for descriptor evolution and how Taproot descriptors fit into wallet tooling.

resources.title: BIP 380: Output Script Descriptors
resources.notes: General descriptor semantics that Taproot descriptors build on.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for Taproot outputs, wallet construction, and descriptor-oriented tooling.
